CEN Response Viewer

Response 214941238

Gold-Level SDA Partnership

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Kia America Inc and the Valley Kia Dealers partnered with SDA for a new 3-year partnership at a Gold Level. Kia wished to have premium brand placement in TV visible location in Mountain America Stadium and Desert Financial arena to access the affinity of Sun Devil fans in Arizona.

Question

Activity Start Date / End Date

Start Date

2025-07-01 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

End Date

2026-06-30 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

Question

Public Service or Community Engagement

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.
